audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone at a moderate pace, with no noticeable background noise or emotional inflection.
temporal_description: A woman with short brown hair, wearing a dark red top and dark pants, stands with her back to the camera, facing a body on a gurney. Two men stand behind her: one in a white shirt and tie, the other in a dark suit. A fourth person, wearing a white coat, enters from the right and leans over the body, appearing to examine it with a device. The man in the white shirt looks down at the body, while the man in the suit places his hand on his chest. The woman remains still, facing the body. The room has wooden doors and a white coat hanging on the wall.
